steps.title: Spot the time-shift signal
steps.content: The first sentence anchors the discussion to “Before it unveiled a massive new gallery in 2009.” The blank must transition to the present, answering the implicit question: “What about now?”

steps.title: Match the temporal answer
steps.content: “Today” marks the present moment, directly answering the time shift set up by “Before.” The other choices either add information, exemplify a non-existent claim, or suggest an unexpected contrast. This matches the correct answer—D is correct.
